title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: A multi-agent system architecture that minimizes LLM calls by using deterministic algorithms (specifically the Spine and Sprout algorithm for route planning) and the before_model_callback mechanism to bypass the model when appropriate. Demonstrated with 1000 agents running a marathon simulation with near-zero LLM invocations.
